title: UAE crackdown: 25 arrested for spreading misleading content and glorifying military aggression
summary_full: UAE authorities have ordered the arrest of 25 individuals accused of spreading fabricated online content that could jeopardize national defense and incite panic. Investigations revealed these suspects, from various nationalities, used digital platforms to circulate manipulated footage and narratives related to regional tensions, leading to expedited trial proceedings.
